# Checklist

## General
- [ ] I reviewed the changed page(s) in a browser
- [ ] Links and asset paths still work
- [ ] Mobile and desktop layouts still look reasonable
- [ ] I updated copy, dates, and titles consistently

## If this PR adds or edits a post
- [ ] The post exists in `posts/`
- [ ] `posts.html` includes the correct title, date, and summary
- [ ] Open Graph metadata in the post page is updated
- [ ] Any post images are stored in `posts/images/` and referenced correctly

## If this PR updates the timeline or navigation
- [ ] `app.js` was updated in the right section
- [ ] External links still open correctly
- [ ] CV label and CV file path match if the CV changed

## If this PR changes styling
- [ ] Shared styles in `styles.css` do not break top-level pages or post pages
- [ ] Typography, spacing, and color choices stay consistent with the site

# Verification

## Pages checked
- [ ] `/`
- [ ] `/about.html`
- [ ] `/posts.html`
- [ ] Changed post page(s)
